actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / targeted literature and assumption exercises complete; missing O_s/O_sp-to-O_H bridge remains open

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: A same-source label fixes the physical Higgs coordinate.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: derive k_top/k_gauge=1 or measure a joint top-W/H response identity
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: common source rescalings cancel, but sector-overlap ratios can still vary

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: Exact Z(s,0) or C_ss determines C_sH and C_HH.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: define O_H and measure/derive the 2x2 matrix-valued spectral rows
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: matrix spectral measures with identical ss marginal can have different off-diagonal entries

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: FMS lets us write O_H without an EW/Higgs action on PR230.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: same-source EW/Higgs action certificate or independent canonical O_H theorem
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: FMS is an operator expansion after a gauge-Higgs theory and composite are supplied

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: Holonomic/Picard-Fuchs methods can replace the missing operator definition.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: first define Z(beta,s,h), then use holonomic/tensor contraction
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: they compute derivatives of a defined functional; they do not choose the h source

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: One neutral scalar pole is automatic from Cl(3)/Z3 symmetry.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: primitive cone / positivity-improving / rank-one neutral scalar theorem
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: symmetry labels do not exclude orthogonal neutral scalar admixture or top coupling

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: The v input fixes the source-Higgs normalization.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: source-Higgs Gram purity or W/Z gauge-normalized response
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: v is a substrate input for y_t computation, not a certificate that O_s=O_H

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: Invariant-ring uniqueness of H dagger H closes O_s=O_H.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: derive the Higgs doublet/action from PR230 surface before using invariant theory
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: unique invariant exists after a same-surface Higgs doublet is supplied

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: Tannaka/DR reconstruction can be used with current scalar rows.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: build category-level charge/intertwiner/fiber-functor data or drop this route
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: reconstruction needs a rich observable tensor category, not one source marginal

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: Finite moment prefixes are enough for scalar-LSZ determinacy.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: finite-rank moment certificate or threshold/FV/IR theorem
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: Prony/stieltjes routes need finite-rank, separation, or asymptotic authority

assumption_questioning_exercise.assumption: A measured y_t-compatible number can select the bridge.
assumption_questioning_exercise.repair: only use rows derived/measured on the current Cl(3)/Z3 surface
assumption_questioning_exercise.why: observed top/y_t targets would be fitted selectors, not derivation inputs

conditional_surface_status: The literature suggests two serious positive routes: measure multi-output same-source rows, or derive a positivity-improving rank-one neutral scalar theorem. Both require new current-surface artifacts.
exact_next_action: Pursue either the measured multi-output route (same-source W/Z or O_H rows with covariance/Gram purity) or the derivation-preferred rank-one route (primitive cone plus positivity-improving neutral scalar transfer theorem). Holonomic/D-module/tensor tools become useful only after Z(beta,s,h) or equivalent row definitions exist.

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can gauge-invariant Higgs language identify current PR230 O_s with O_H?
literature_exercise.finding: Useful physical language, but conditional on an EW/Higgs action and a gauge-invariant composite operator. It does not supply the current PR230 h-source or source-overlap identity.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: same-source EW/Higgs action certificate or canonical O_H certificate

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Does exact source spectral data determine C_sH/C_HH?
literature_exercise.finding: No. Source-only C_ss is one marginal entry of a matrix-valued spectral measure. Off-diagonal and HH entries require either the second operator or extra constraints.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: 2x2 matrix spectral measure rows for O_s and O_H
literature_exercise.route_status: no-go for source-only; exact-support for future two-source rows
sources: Lopez-Rodriguez matrix moment Nevanlinna parametrization: https://www.mscand.dk/article/view/14340

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can input-output data fix the hidden scalar coordinate?
literature_exercise.finding: Minimal realizations are coordinate-free up to similarity. This maps directly to the PR230 source-coordinate ambiguity: source-only transfer data can identify a realization class, not the canonical Higgs coordinate.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: joint top/W/H response rows with observability/rank certificate
literature_exercise.route_status: no-go for coordinate identity; support for multi-output response route

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can a hidden overlap be inferred from one class of marginal measurements?
literature_exercise.finding: Generally no. These literatures clarify the need for masks, views, or conditional-independence structure. The PR230 analog is a need for non-source rows such as C_sH/C_HH or W/Z output.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: additional independent view: O_H, W/Z, or neutral projector row

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can uniqueness of the neutral scalar state remove the O_H overlap ambiguity?
literature_exercise.finding: Potentially the best derivation-preferred route. If a current-surface neutral scalar transfer operator is positivity improving on a certified cone, the first scalar eigenvector can be unique. Current PR230 lacks the cone, irreducibility, and primitive certificate.

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can charged field/Higgs structure be reconstructed from observables?
literature_exercise.finding: Conceptually relevant but too large for immediate PR230. It reconstructs symmetry/field structure from a rich observable category, not from current source-only scalar rows.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: explicit current-surface tensor category/fiber functor data

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can PR541-style exact math compute the bridge?
literature_exercise.finding: It can compute rows after Z(beta,s,h) is defined. It cannot define h, O_H, kappa_s, or the source-Higgs identity.
literature_exercise.route_status: tool after object definition; blocked now

literature_exercise.bridge_question: Can exact finite-shell moments identify pole data?
literature_exercise.finding: Can reconstruct a finite sparse measure if finite-support and separation assumptions are certified. Current PR230 has finite prefixes, not an exact finite-support theorem.
literature_exercise.next_positive_artifact: finite-rank Stieltjes/moment certificate or threshold theorem

parent_statuses.action_first_oh_artifact_attempt: exact negative boundary / action-first O_H artifact not constructible from current PR230 surface
parent_statuses.full_positive_closure_assembly_gate: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.holonomic_source_response_gate: exact negative boundary / PR541-style holonomic source-response route is relevant but blocked by missing current-surface O_H and h-source
parent_statuses.neutral_primitive_cone_gate: exact-support / neutral-scalar primitive-cone certificate gate; strict irreducibility certificate absent
parent_statuses.retained_closure_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.same_source_sector_overlap: exact negative boundary / same-source sector-overlap identity obstruction
parent_statuses.schur_abc_definition_attempt: exact negative boundary / Schur A/B/C definition not derivable from current PR230 source-only surface
parent_statuses.source_functional_lsz_identifiability: exact negative boundary / source-functional LSZ identifiability theorem
parent_statuses.source_higgs_gram_purity: open / source-Higgs Gram purity gate not passed

proposal_allowed_reason: The exercises identify route families and expose assumptions; they do not supply O_H, h-source, C_sH/C_HH, W/Z response rows, or a rank-one neutral scalar theorem.

route_ranking.target: top + W/Z or O_H rows on same ensemble
route_ranking.why_best: turns hidden overlap into an observed covariance/ratio instead of an assumed identity

route_ranking.target: primitive cone and irreducible transfer operator in neutral scalar sector
route_ranking.why_best: derivation-preferred path that could make source-only pole data sufficient

route_ranking.route: same-source EW/Higgs action then invariant/FMS O_H
route_ranking.target: derive EW/Higgs action tied to the PR230 source coordinate
route_ranking.why_best: most direct O_H construction once the action is real

route_ranking.target: 2x2 Stieltjes/Herglotz rows for O_s and O_H
route_ranking.why_best: mathematically exact acceptance framework for C_sH/C_HH

route_ranking.blocking_artifact: far more category data than PR230 currently has
route_ranking.target: reconstruct charged field/Higgs structure from observable category

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not use H_unit or yt_ward_identity
does not use observed y_t/top mass, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, or R_conn
does not identify O_s or O_sp with O_H
does not treat any literature source as a current-surface bridge theorem
